name: Newland Digital Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Newland Digital Technology Co.,Ltd. provides bar code, financial payment, mobile and other communications, traffic information, and Internet finance services in China and internationally. The company offers bar code recognition technology; POS machines for electronic financial payment; mobile information technology; cloud computing and big data services; traffic information business software, equipment, and systems service solutions; and online to offline QR code marketing services. It also provides system construction and operation services of intelligent transportation solutions; develops, constructs, and operates expressways electromechanical information; constructs and operates car networking systems; rail transit electromechanical information; develops and constructs intelligent parking lots; and designs and constructs provincial and municipal intelligent traffic card application planning and technical standards. In addition, the company offers software development, hardware manufacturing, and system integration services in the field of food safety; animal identification and disease traceability systems for the Department of Agriculture; meat and vegetable circulation traceability systems to the Ministry of Commerce; national veterinary drug product traceability information systems; Chinese medicine tracing systems for the Ministry of Commerce; and construction services for Beijing Olympic food safety project. Further, it provides consumer, small and micro-operating, and online merchant micro-loans. The company was formerly known as Fujian Newland Computer Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Newland Digital Technology Co.,Ltd. in November 2018. Newland Digital Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Fuzhou, China.
